sandbox-config.description: SandboxGuard — pre-flight enforcement for all Graph API calls
sandbox-config.blocking_override: Meta Graph API Extension §1 — must complete before any task making outbound calls

rate-limit-manager.description: D15 — X-App-Usage parsing, exponential backoff with jitter, Retry-After support

webhook-idempotency.blocking_override: Meta Graph API Extension §3 — idempotency test MUST precede handler implementation

graph-api-client.notes: httpClient injected as dependency — node-fetch v2 in tests, native fetch in production. Required because nock does not intercept Node 22 native fetch.
graph-api-client.description: Outbound HTTP client integrating SandboxGuard and RateLimitManager

webhook-controller.description: Express webhook endpoint — hub challenge + message ingestion

deviations_from_plan: graph-api-client: httpClient made injectable (fetch dep) — nock does not intercept Node 22 native fetch; node-fetch v2 injected in tests, native fetch used in production. This is a design improvement, not a regression.

D15.label: Graph API Resilience
checks: Triggers preemptive backoff when any axis >= 80%
Implements exponential backoff with full jitter on 429
Respects Retry-After header — uses its value with absolute priority
Zero hardcoded retry intervals anywhere in codebase
D15.failure_example: Ignoring X-App-Usage and retrying immediately after a rate-limit warning

rules: Tests that hit graph.facebook.com without sandbox:true fixture are blocking violations
Any sleep(N) or setTimeout(fn, N) where N is a literal number must fail lint
IG_SANDBOX_MODE=true must be set in all CI test environments
